focus: Hallmark ROADMAP proposals versus shipped sk-design modes and /interface:* commands
noveltyJustification: Four findings establish genuinely new capability or contract boundaries and five materially refine already-shipped overlap into exact targets; (4 + 5*0.5) / 9 = 0.72 after rounding.
keyQuestions: Which named Hallmark ROADMAP proposals are already shipped, deserve surgical strengthening, are genuinely new, or should be skipped?
What exact paths and phased dependencies should own surviving proposals without violating extraction, anti-preset, or motion boundaries?
answeredQuestions: Variant and explain are shipped jobs; brand-first authored systems and project-path render adaptation are genuinely new boundaries; multi-page coherence, semantic motion, structural fingerprints, negative-capability rationale, and emotion intake fit existing owners.
ruledOut: Separate redesign, variant, study, or explain commands
A public variant alias when directions already owns the job
Generated brand values inside measured Style Reference DESIGN.md
Hallmark themes, motion multipliers, emotion labels, or structural sketches as presets
A new multi-page extraction relationship type

text: Brief-authored brand artifacts must remain distinctly named and validated separately from measured Style Reference DESIGN.md.
Add standalone redesign, variant, study, or explain commands, or convert themes, emotion labels, motion multipliers, and structural sketches into presets.
